response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-03:15: Identified the song as a medley of 'Lupin the Fire' and 'Grateful Days' based on lyrics and the performer's later comments. 2. 03:15-05:00: Identified as talking/closing segment. 3. Searched for lyrics for both 'Lupin the Fire' (SEAMO) and 'Grateful Days' (Dragon Ash). Found both and combined them for the performance segment.
response.global_summary: The video features Inugami Korone performing a medley of 'Lupin the Fire' (originally by SEAMO) and 'Grateful Days' (originally by Dragon Ash) for her 7th anniversary, followed by a closing talk.

scenes.description: The performance of the 'Lupin the Fire' and 'Grateful Days' medley. The performer is Inugami Korone.
scenes.song_title: Lupin the Fire / Grateful Days Medley
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
[Lupin the Fire]
Let me show your my everything
夢のこのファンタジーを見てな
今こそ走るときなんだ (it's show time)
そこで見ててよワンマンショー
これぐらいの試練じゃ足んないよ
僕がほしいのは物じゃない i steal your heart
...

[Grateful Days]
Turn up radio そう 今日も聞こえるよ
風に揺られ流れる stereo
肩で刻む軽快な rhythm
想いをのっけて届けるよ rhyme
...
[Full lyrics combined]
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
[Lupin the Fire]
Let me show you're my everything
Looking at this fantasy of dreams
It's show time, this is the time to run
Look at it there, it's a one-man show
This level of trial isn't enough
What I want isn't a thing, I steal your heart

[Grateful Days]
Turn up radio, I can hear it today too
The stereo swaying in the wind, a gentle rhythm carved on my shoulder
Feelings ride on the rhyme, and reach you
Right under the clear sky, we headed toward the far-away future
...

[Lupin the Fire]
...

[Full lyrics combined]

scenes.description: Korone talks about her 7th anniversary and the medley performance.
